apiBaseUrl.title: API Base URL
apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the smarts.bio API

websiteBaseUrl.title: Website Base URL
websiteBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the smarts.bio website (used for OAuth sign-in)

sendOnEnter.title: Send on Enter
sendOnEnter.description: Send chat messages when pressing Enter (use Shift+Enter for newline)

enableKernelContext.title: Enable Kernel Context
enableKernelContext.description: Include kernel variable names as context when sending queries

pollingIntervalMs.title: Polling Interval (ms)
pollingIntervalMs.description: How often to poll for process status updates in the Processes panel
